purpose: Narya UI implementation handoff for Gemini
rules: Original ui/*.png files remain the visual truth source.
Use ui/specs/*.spec.md for dimensions, palette, boundary hints, and implementation notes.
Use ui/specs/spec-index.json for machine-readable source/spec mapping.
Use Element Plus for business pages only after applying Narya design tokens and theme overrides.
Do not rewrite Dashboard, Splash, or AppShell core visuals with default Element Plus components.
Screenshot at the same canvas size after implementation and compare against the PNG.
recommendedFirstImplementation: settings page as Element Plus themed sample
